chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-2889 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 22.03.2022 Mr. Shakir Ali Talpur, advocate holds brief for Syed Tariq Ahmed Shah, advocate for petitioner. Mr. Parkash Kumar, advocate for respondents No.4 to 6. Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri, Assistant AG Sindh. ----- Learned counsel for the petitioner pleads no instructions and the petition is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution along with pending application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
